{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173615EE16DC7A9837FACA4DFC"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7456762744412095257","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"诙谐有趣，非常值得一读[微笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736167386,"group_id":"7411441483854646334","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz2foWPmG6HQSV422T1OCgs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"862438885692254","user_name":"蓟城的燕狂徒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"862438885692254","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411441483854646334","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一部最精短、更生动的中国通史。“文字鬼才”马伯庸上起战国秦汉，下至晚清民国，以寥寥数笔，勾勒出中国历史的线索；打破以政治大事为纬、以帝王更替为经的写史手法，用最新颖的主题“王朝的德性”重新串联历史；穿插以马式冷幽默的犀利评点，将枯燥单调的历史变得新鲜有趣。
翻开《马伯庸笑翻中国简史》，战国、秦、汉、三国、隋、唐、宋、元等历史时期将轮番上阵，颠覆争霸、强盛的历史形象，展现它们不为人知的一面；新朝、前赵、前燕、冉魏、刘宋、后周等并不起眼的政权也一个不落、各具特色地接连登场，在魏晋南北朝、五胡十六国、五代十国等混乱时代演出一场场鲜活、生动的荒诞剧目。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3c59c079d82475ddccdb78588a76c467~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"马伯庸","author_id":"","book_id":"7411441483854646334","book_name":"马伯庸笑翻中国简史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"16.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7411441509699963966","read_count":"4327","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"97836"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"35","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3c59c079d82475ddccdb78588a76c467~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183375&x-signature=%2FRazf5GwpsPjDO3Zr5YgJeEDHcc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"94"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173615EE16DC7A9837FACA4DFC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":23621,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":40004,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":2252},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7588191809065321240","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"2025/12/27  初读完结[书架加一]
马老师的风格依旧活泼又幽默，这本书中的有些观点我尊重但不苟同。
不管是“阴阳”学说，还是“五行”、“五德”论，我保持“存在即合理”的看法。
我不认为应该把这些当作“糟粕”去摒弃掉，而是应该客观看待，至少这些学说在过去起到过安定国家、统一民心的作用。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766766789,"group_id":"7411441483854646334","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"回首向来萧瑟处，归去，也无风雨也无晴～🎏","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3rt5LZ+D1F6NqKuHUcnIYqbCNPjanTGgX0wrZLjVal+","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/19da235c943e4a34b8ebc3cdeb2e6805~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529041&x-signature=cXj11h3%2Bf8i52i%2FOV6pq0a48mUg%3D","user_id":"4116224004860471","user_name":"星月阑珊🌻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4116224004860471","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411441483854646334","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一部最精短、更生动的中国通史。“文字鬼才”马伯庸上起战国秦汉，下至晚清民国，以寥寥数笔，勾勒出中国历史的线索；打破以政治大事为纬、以帝王更替为经的写史手法，用最新颖的主题“王朝的德性”重新串联历史；穿插以马式冷幽默的犀利评点，将枯燥单调的历史变得新鲜有趣。
翻开《马伯庸笑翻中国简史》，战国、秦、汉、三国、隋、唐、宋、元等历史时期将轮番上阵，颠覆争霸、强盛的历史形象，展现它们不为人知的一面；新朝、前赵、前燕、冉魏、刘宋、后周等并不起眼的政权也一个不落、各具特色地接连登场，在魏晋南北朝、五胡十六国、五代十国等混乱时代演出一场场鲜活、生动的荒诞剧目。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/3c59c079d82475ddccdb78588a76c467~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"马伯庸","author_id":"","book_id":"7411441483854646334","book_name":"马伯庸笑翻中国简史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"16.4万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7411441509699963966","read_count":"4327","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"97836"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"35","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3c59c079d82475ddccdb78588a76c467~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183375&x-signature=%2FRazf5GwpsPjDO3Zr5YgJeEDHcc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320173615EE16DC7A9837FACA4DFC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":15104,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":25698,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":415},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435521027335537471","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书太有趣啦！马伯庸老师用幽默的语言讲述了中国历史，让我这个对历史不太感兴趣的人都读得津津有味！他还用了很多新颖的主题来串联历史，像是“王朝的德性”，让历史变得不再枯燥。就像书里说的“历史就像一个任人打扮的小姑娘”，我们要用不同的视角去看待它。我推荐大家都来读一读这本书，一定会让你笑翻的！","text_exts":[{"e":26,"s":22,"text":"中国历史","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773999375FACA4DFC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227435521027335537471%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227411441483854646334%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729208760,"group_id":"7411441483854646334","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生活能够漂泊，能够孤独，但灵魂必须有所归依。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwVzfmfCDIgIymqxK5pYtTzfuR70FpMQSa69VEJ7e0Ng","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/193258f6cbd147948ad31a1fb1058b57~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776537627&x-signature=Ck6WypZV5XOvOFnDVf9rWG1Ayy0%3D","user_id":"2049957045476152","user_name":"本命少年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2049957045476152","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411441483854646334","book_info":{"abstract":"这是一部最精短、更生动的中国通史。“文字鬼才”马伯庸上起战国秦汉，下至晚清民国，以寥寥数笔，勾勒出中国历史的线索；打破以政治大事为纬、以帝王更替为经的写史手法，用最新颖的主题“王朝的德性”重新串联历史；穿插以马式冷幽默的犀利评点，将枯燥单调的历史变得新鲜有趣。
